title: CubesidePack lite
body:
# CubesidePack lite

This is the modpack with recommended mods for a perfekt Minecraft experience. 

It includes performance mods, a VoiceChat and the CubesideMod.

It is the smaller version of the [CubesidePack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cubesidepack) with fewer performance mods.

## Included mods

[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)

[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)

[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

[CubesideMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubesidemod)
